tasks.title: CYCLE 1 — AUTOGEN: Research Synthesis
tasks.description: Auto-generated cycle to turn research into actionable improvements.

tasks.title: [RESEARCH] Synthesize improvements from latest research
tasks.description:
Review the latest research artifact and extract 3 candidate improvements.

Recipe:
1. Read the provided research artifact.
2. Identify 3 distinct high-value technical improvements.
3. For each, document the evidence, benefit, and a test plan.
4. Update the descriptions of the subsequent [IMPROVE] and [EVAL] tasks in TASK_QUEUE.json with concrete criteria.

Acceptance Criteria:
- 3 improvements extracted with full metadata.
- Future tasks in this cycle updated with implementation details.

tasks.title: [IMPROVE] Implement highest-value improvement
tasks.description:
Implement the top-ranked improvement from the synthesis task.

Recipe:
1. Review the acceptance criteria added by the [RESEARCH] task.
2. Implement the changes in the main workspace.
3. Update or add tests to verify the new functionality.
4. Run the full test suite to ensure no regressions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Feature implemented according to research specs.
- All tests pass successfully.

tasks.title: [EVAL] Validate improvement impact
tasks.description:
Evaluate the implemented improvement using existing eval tools or reports.

Recipe:
1. Run the evaluation suite or baseline/after comparisons.
2. Record the quantitative and qualitative results.
3. Decide whether to keep the improvement or revert based on impact.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Evaluation report generated in agent/reports.
- Clear recommendation (keep/revert) documented.
